mapper.select: select co.course_id /* course */ , co.title /* course */ , cc.class_name , tu.name /* tb_userinfo -> proffesor */ , scs.name as scs_name/* 수강상태 student_course_status*/ , co.start_date , co.end_date from student_course sc inner join course co on sc.course_id = co.course_id inner join course_class cc ON co.class_id = cc.class_id inner join tb_userinfo tu on tu.loginId = co.professor inner join student_course_status scs on scs.stu_cou_sta_code = sc.stu_cou_sta_code where sc.loginID = #{loginID} order by sc.stu_cou_sta_code asc

SELECT co.course_id , co.title , cc.class_name , co.start_date , co.end_date , COALESCE(scs.name, '미등록') AS scs_name -- 상태가 없으면 '미등록' 표시 , COUNT(sc.stu_cou_id) AS student_cnt -- 수강생 수 , ct.start_time , ct.end_time FROM course co LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON cc.class_id = co.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time ct ON ct.time_code = co.time_code LEFT JOIN student_course sc ON sc.course_id = co.course_id LEFT JOIN student_course_status scs ON scs.stu_cou_sta_code = sc.stu_cou_sta_code WHERE co.professor = #{loginID} GROUP BY co.course_id , co.title , cc.class_name , co.start_date , co.end_date , scs.name , ct.start_time , ct.end_time ORDER BY co.start_date DESC
